category_sources: source_facts.description says it generates PDFs and images from HTML; official docs describe PlutoPrint as a Python library for generating PDFs/images from HTML/XML.
display_name_sources: Official documentation title and overview use the name PlutoPrint.
docs_sources: Official PlutoPrint Read the Docs site linked from the project README and shown in the docs overview.
